title: How does monday.com store data?
excerpt:
Hello All, 
I have a client who wants to know how monday.com stores data i.e. does it use a relational database (and if so, which one?) or does it store data another way e.g. using flat files? 
Thanks! 
Ivan Grice,

posts.author: IvanGrice (Ivan Grice)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All,

I have a client who wants to know how monday.com stores data i.e. does it use a relational database (and if so, which one?) or does it store data another way e.g. using flat files?

Thanks!

Ivan Grice,
Work Perfect,
Sydney
